avalanche.action_plan: Keep paying standard EMIs but aggressively redirect your investable surplus into the loan with the highest interest rate first.
avalanche.benefit: Mathematically saves the maximum amount of money on interest out-of-pocket.

snowball.action_plan: Target and clear the loan with the smallest outstanding principal balance first by adding extra surplus cash to it.
snowball.benefit: Eliminates lines of credit rapidly, providing psychological wins and reducing the number of active EMIs.

prepayment.action_plan: Deploy a portion of your idle savings account balance directly into your long-term loan principal (e.g., Home/Car Loan).
prepayment.benefit: Drastically reduces your remaining loan tenure and shrinks your lifetime interest burden.

consolidation.strategy_name: SBI Personal Loan for Debt Consolidation
consolidation.action_plan: In severe cases, close multiple high-interest external loans by migrating them into a single structured SBI personal loan at 11.15%.
consolidation.benefit: Lowers overall monthly EMI outflow when the current debt ratio is critical.
